name: Run opening line readiness check
description: Install a structured line-opening check across product, equipment, station setup, 86 risk, and immediate blockers so service does not begin on hidden fragility.
source_ref: core-v2: restore readiness before live execution compounds preventable instability
entry_conditions: The line starts service with missing prep, unclear 86s, or surprise equipment issues.
Someone with authority can stop the open long enough to resolve red conditions.
contraindications: Do not convert this into a box-ticking ritual without stop/go rules.
Do not open the line while critical blockers remain unresolved but undocumented.
proof_of_completion: A visible readiness check exists for station setup, product, equipment, and 86 risk.
Red conditions have explicit escalation and open-delay logic.
The line has completed the check before at least one live service start.
